title: The many deaths of Mario Part 3
description:
(For some reason there was a lot of lag during this level it didn't help at all!)

In this part I added a lot of random edits and I probably won't do that for every single video.

*To anyone who can speak german I KNOW that what I wrote is not what he's actually saying this is only for fun.* The funny part is I fail at adding *me* and I corrected it with a annotation.*
